meaning: n.食品室,酒贮藏室adj.像黄油样的,奉承的
examples: The flavor of a croissant should be intensely buttery with a natural dairy sweetness.
Mounds of Turkey piled high with buttery mashed potatoes, dripping with gravy.
The kernels were buttery and sweet with a crisp bite, far better than the usual supermarket specimens.
Before you venture out, enjoy a complimentary breakfast of assorted fresh fruit, buttery pastries, and cereals.
It melts into a buttery pool as the mouth produces a tide of saliva.
